title: Communauté de communes Artois-Lys
summary: The Communauté de communes Artois-Lys was located in the Pas-de-Calais département, in northern France. It was created in January 1993. It was merged into the Communauté d'agglomération de Béthune-Bruay, Artois-Lys Romane in January 2017.
text:
The Communauté de communes Artois-Lys was located in the Pas-de-Calais département, in northern France. It was created in January 1993. It was merged into the Communauté d'agglomération de Béthune-Bruay, Artois-Lys Romane in January 2017.

Composition
It comprised the following 21 communes:
